title: lodhra bractealis
intro: Lodhra bractealis, also known as Symplocos racemosa, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the Symplocaceae family, commonly found in the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which help to treat various health conditions such as menstrual disorders, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lodhra bractealis include its ability to regulate menstrual cycles, reduce menstrual cramps and pain, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Lodhra bracteatearis is used in various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and tablets, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
